title: Revision B: Simple Past vs Present Perfect
description: Simple Past und Present Perfect anwenden: Zeitmarker und die richtigen Verbformen einsetzen

items.question: 'a week ___' → Zeitmarker für Simple Past
'___ week' → Zeitmarker für Simple Past
'___' → Zeitmarker für Simple Past (gestern)
'never ... ___' → Zeitmarker für Present Perfect
'___' → Zeitmarker für Present Perfect (schon)
'___' → Zeitmarker für Present Perfect (je)
'___' → Zeitmarker für Present Perfect (noch nicht)
Craig ___ back to school after the accident. (come – Present Perfect)
I've already ___ you three times how it happened. (tell – PP Partizip)
She ___ her homework with her left hand yesterday. (do – Simple Past)
He ___ never experienced a broken arm before this. (have – PP, I/he form)
'already' steht ___ dem Hilfsverb im Present Perfect.
'before' steht am ___ des Satzes im Present Perfect.
I ___ my arm a week ago. (Simple Past von 'break')
I ___ already told you. (Present Perfect Hilfsverb)
I ___ never had a broken arm before.
I ___ to write with my broken arm yesterday.
Present Perfect Struktur: ___ + Partizip II
'ago' → Deutsch
'already' → Deutsch
